description: After exhausting all collection efforts, the company has decided to write off an old, unpaid invoice for a customer who has gone out of business.

nodes.task_description: Receive authorization from the controller to write off the specific invoice.
Create a journal entry to debit the 'Allowance for Doubtful Accounts' and credit 'Accounts Receivable'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the correct write-off journal entry.

nodes.task_description: Apply the entry to the specific customer invoice to remove it from the AR aging report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent closes the invoice and removes it from the customer's outstanding balance.
